assignments.description: Assignment to get Picklist Choice Set IDs
assignments.name: Assign_Picklist_Choices
assignments.label: Assign Picklist Choices

assignments.description: Assign the Values to the Record Placeholder
assignments.name: X110_set_New_Opp_Values
assignments.label: 110. set New Opp Values

value.stringValue: No next step on this opp

choices.name: choice_type_120_Demo_NewUnitRequest
choices.choiceText: 120 - Demo – New Unit Request ($0-SIOP Planning only)

value.stringValue: Demo – New Unit Request ($0-SIOP Planning only)

choices.name: choice_type_130_Demo_ForSaletoCustomer
choices.choiceText: 130 - Demo – For Sale to Customer ($$-Not for SIOP planning)

value.stringValue: Demo – For Sale to Customer ($$-Not for SIOP planning)

choices.description: Created by PwC as part of SC-516
choices.name: NewServiceContract

decisions.description: Check for Sales Org and Sales Type to setup Shipping Terms
decisions.name: Check_for_Sales_Org_and_Sales_Type_to_setup_Shipping_Terms
decisions.label: Check for Sales Org and Sales Type to setup Shipping Terms

decisions.name: Check_If_There_Are_Any_Contracts
decisions.label: Check If There Are Any Contracts

decisions.description: If on Opp Record, we need to get Primary Contact
decisions.name: X10_Decide_Starting_Record
decisions.label: 10. Decide Starting Record

decisions.description: does user have the fxUserExtraAttribute to indicate User is 1010-OneSource
decisions.name: X30_Decide_if_OneSource_User
decisions.label: 30. Decide if OneSource User

decisions.description: This node is added on behalf of Ticket#-INC0318508 (missing SAP Id)
decisions.name: X5_Decide_Continue
decisions.label: 5. Decide Continue

decisions.description: User can not select accounts that are blocked or invalid
decisions.name: X60_Decide_Account_is_Valid
decisions.label: 60. Decide Account is Valid

decisions.description: To see if the selected contact matches the selected account (in use case of Opp from Account where Contact is not prepopulated)
decisions.name: X70_Decide_Contact_Matches_Account
decisions.label: 70. Decide Contact Matches Account

Flow.description: This is the default method to create opportunities from objects and list views PRIOR: 2022.08.25 NEW: 2023.03.03 Added notes on fxDefaultTerritory New: RM 2024.05.08 Updated the update formula 'fxDefaultClosedDate' & 'choice_type_190_Reagent_CustomSynthsischoice' with the choice value '190 - Reagent - Custom Synthesis'. PWC added Changes: SC-620, SC-642, SC-540, SC-516

formulas.name: fxAccountAlpha2
formulas.expression:
BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( {!single_opp_current.Account.ShippingCountry} , {!single_contact.Account.ShippingCountry} ) , {!single_account.ShippingCountry} ) , {!single_interaction.Account__r.ShippingCountry} ) , {!single_lead.Account__r.ShippingCountry} ) , {!X50_get_Account_Info.Id} ) , "" )
/* single_opp_current.Account.ShippingCountry */

formulas.description: Used to pull in Account ID based on the starting Object
formulas.name: fxAccountId
formulas.expression: BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( {!single_opp_current.AccountId} , {!single_contact.AccountId} ) , {!single_account.Id} ) , {!single_interaction.Account__c} ) , {!single_lead.Account__c} ) , {!X50_get_Account_Info.Id} ) , "" )

formulas.description: The final Close Date
formulas.name: fxCloseDate

formulas.description: If this is true then only opportunity creation will happen from contact. This node is added on behalf of Ticket#-INC0318508
formulas.name: fxContact_IsMissingSAPId

formulas.description: Used to obtain the Contact ID based on the starting Object
formulas.name: fxContactId
fxContactLastName
formulas.expression: BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( {!X60a_2_get_Contact_Info.LastName} , {!X10a_2_get_Contact_Info.LastName} ) , {!single_opp_current.Primary_Contact__r.LastName} ) , {!single_contact.LastName} ) , {!single_interaction.Contact__r.LastName} ) , {!single_interaction.fxLastName__c} ) , {!single_lead.LastName} ) , "")

formulas.description: This contact selected matches the Account
formulas.name: fxContactMatchesAccount
fxContactName
formulas.expression: BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( BLANKVALUE( {!X10a_2_get_Contact_Info.Name} , {!single_opp_current.Primary_Contact__r.Name} ) , {!single_contact.Name} ) , {!single_interaction.Contact__r.Name} ) , {!single_interaction.fxFullName__c} ) , {!single_lead.Name} ) , "")

formulas.description: This is True/False of whether we are creating a Dealer Opp or not
formulas.name: fxCreateDealerOpp

formulas.description: denotes current year
formulas.name: fxCurrentYear

formulas.description: denotes the default close date(editable though) for new opportunities.
formulas.name: fxDefaultClosedDate
formulas.expression: IF({!checkRecordTypeConsumables} = TRUE, TODAY() + 7, If({!Quick_Close}=True, ADDMONTHS(TODAY(),1) ,ADDMONTHS(TODAY(), CASE ({!Type} , "190 - Reagent - Custom Synthesis", 1 , "200 - Reagent - One Time", 1 , "210 - Reagent - Standing Order", 1 , "170 - Monthly RunRate", 1 , "180 - NA Aftermarket-SalesLoft", 1 , 6) )))

formulas.description: Calculate the default currency to populate on Screen 1. Currently Account Country pricebook Currency
formulas.name: fxDefaultCurrency

formulas.description: If user is NonApac + LDR User , go to Stage Zero, all else Stage 1 (Tenders go to Participation Request)
formulas.name: fxDefaultOppStage
formulas.expression: IF( {!X80_LKUP_Record_Type_ID.resultRecordTypeLabel} = 'Tender', 'Participation Request Initiation', IF({!X45_Get_Selected_Record_Type.DeveloperName} = 'Consumables', 'Stage 1 - Create', IF({!X45_Get_Selected_Record_Type.DeveloperName} = 'ServiceContract', 'Stage 1 - Create', IF( CONTAINS({!X20_Get_running_user.fxUserAttributes__c},'1000-LDR') , 'Zero Stage' , 'Stage 1 - Create/Plan' ) )))

formulas.description: The rule is: The user has Only 1 territory and that 1 territory matches any of the Account Territory. If the user has 2 Territory (even if only 1 matches), then the Territory must be applied by User on the record
formulas.name: fxDefaultTerritory

formulas.description: Uses opp Type or Instrument if blank
formulas.name: fxDefaultType

formulas.description: Formulate the Opp Name to standardize it
formulas.name: fxOppName

formulas.description: Dynamic link to open opportunity in current word.
formulas.name: fxOppUrl

formulas.description: To map values from type field to OS type fields
formulas.name: fxOSType

formulas.description: Does running user have the LDR Permission?
formulas.name: fxPerm_LDR

formulas.description: This decides what the final value of Quick Close can be (in case the scenario breaks the merge)
formulas.name: fxQuickCloseFinal

formulas.description: Add some screen text to notify user that the quick close option they selected is not possible for the Territory they have.
formulas.name: fxQuickCloseNotice

formulas.description: adds 5 days to Close Date
formulas.name: fxRevRecDate

formulas.description: sale for sales type based on TYPE selected
formulas.name: fxSalesType
formulas.expression: CASE ( {!fxType} , "500 - Expand", "Service" , "510 - Land", "Service" , "520 - Renew", "Service" , "New Service Contract", "Service" , "Product" ) & " Sales"

formulas.description: This determines the Startnig Object
formulas.name: fxStartingObject
fxTerritoryLabel
formulas.expression: IF(AND ({!X60a_1_Get_Territory.varCountTerritory_user} = 1, {!X60a_1_Get_Territory.varCountMatches} = 1) , {!X60a_1_Get_Territory.resultTerritoryName}, "Add territory after the opportunity record is created")

formulas.description: Product/services sales Type selection
formulas.name: fxType

formulas.description: This will help with Validation and Visibility where users have Attribute 1020-Create Dealer Opps
formulas.name: fxUserCanMakeDealerOpps

formulas.description: the user running the flow
formulas.name: fxUserName

formulas.description: This will check if the logged in User is an LDR or an OneSource User. Due to how Flows work, we must get the user record first, then use the values of that record. Additionally, we are evaluating the fxUserAttribute (TEXT) field instead of the fxUserExtraAttribute(Multi-picklist) field as the L.FLOW 9020 copies values form multi picklist to flat text on updates.
formulas.name: fxUserOneSource

formulas.description: This defaults the Who if blank
formulas.name: fxWhoDefault

Flow.label: S.FLOW_2000: Create Opportunity Default

recordLookups.description: Get the first Pricebooks for the same country as the Account
recordLookups.name: X30b_1_get_Account_Pricebook
recordLookups.label: 30b.1. get Account Pricebook

recordLookups.description: Added for Tender process to fit existing record type path
recordLookups.name: X45_Get_Selected_Record_Type
recordLookups.label: 45. Get Selected Record Type

recordLookups.description: Lookup Acount info based on selected record
recordLookups.name: X50_get_Account_Info
recordLookups.label: 50. get_Account_Info

recordUpdates.description: Update the Shipping Terms to DDP and Opp Alias
recordUpdates.name: Update_the_Shipping_Terms_to_DDP_and_Opp_Alias
recordUpdates.label: Update the Shipping Terms to DDP and Opp Alias

recordUpdates.description: To enforce the Alias Name to update on Creation.
recordUpdates.name: X130a_1_Update_Opp_Alias
recordUpdates.label: 130a.1. Update Opp Alias

fields.name: ContractsNofFoundMsg
fields.fieldText: This Account does not have Service Contracts that are available for renewal. If the contract has expired, please create a New Service Contract.

screens.description: This node is added on behalf of Ticket#-INC0318508
screens.name: Copy_1_of_130a_1f_Disp_Opportunity_Updation_Error
screens.label: Copy 1 of 130a.1f Disp Opportunity Updation Error

fields.name: Copy_2_of_text_OppCreatedSucess
fields.fieldText:
{!fxUserFirstname}, Your Opportunity Created Successfully!



Click the link below to view the Opportunity:


{!Create_Opportunity_Contract_Renerwal.opportunityName}


﻿

fields.name: Copy_2_of_QuoteDetailsSummary
fields.fieldText:
Your Quote Created Successfully!



Click the link below to view the Quote:


{!Create_Opportunity_Contract_Renerwal.quoteName}

value.stringValue: [{"apiName":"Parent_Contract_Name__c","guid":"column-55ec","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Parent Contract","wrapText":true,"order":0,"label":"Parent Contract Name","type":"customRichText"},{"apiName":"Installed_Product_Serial_Number_Calc__c","guid":"column-af4f","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Serial Number","wrapText":true,"order":1,"label":"Installed Product Serial Number Calc","type":"customRichText"},{"apiName":"Installed_Product_Name_Calc__c","guid":"column-9ec3","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Product Name","wrapText":true,"order":2,"label":"Installed Product Name Calc","type":"customRichText"},{"apiName":"Installed_Product_Code_Calc__c","guid":"column-57cf","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Product Code","wrapText":true,"order":3,"label":"Installed Product Code Calc","type":"customRichText"},{"apiName":"Parent_Contract_End_Date_Calc__c","guid":"column-6b14","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"End Date","wrapText":true,"order":4,"label":"Parent Contract End Date Calc","type":"date-local"}]

screens.name: X100_Screen_2_Review_Optional
screens.label: 100. Screen 2: Review (Optional)

fields.name: disp_review_header
fields.fieldText: {!fxUserFirstname}, Please Review All Entered Values:

fields.name: disp_opp_name
fields.fieldText: Confirm Opportunity Name :-

fields.name: Opportunity_Name
fields.helpText: Opportunity Name is prepopulated, however you may change it as desired before creating opportunity, or you may also change the name after the opportunity is created.

fields.name: disp_oppInfo
fields.fieldText:
• Account Name :- {!AccountName.recordName}
  • Contact Name :- {!ContactName.recordName}
  • Opportunity Name (Alias) :- {!fxOppName}
  • ﻿Territory Name :- {!fxTerritoryLabel}

fields.name: disp_close_date
fields.fieldText: Confirm Close Date :-

fields.name: disp_gen_details
fields.fieldText:
General Opp Details

  1. ﻿Sales Type :- {!fxSalesType}
  2. Type :- {!Type}
  3. ﻿Solution Area Of Interest :- {!Solution_Area_of_Interest}
  4. ﻿Product Line Name :- {!Product_Lines}
  5. Currency :-{!X90_Get_Pricebook_ID.Currency__c}
  6. Pricebook :- {!Pricebook_all}
  7. Quick Close :- {!fxQuickCloseFinal} {!fxQuickCloseNotice}
  8. Record Type :- {!X45_Get_Selected_Record_Type.Name}

fields.name: disp_gen_details_Service
fields.fieldText:
General Opp Details

  1. ﻿Sales Type :- {!fxSalesType}
  2. Type :- {!ServiceContractType}
  3. Currency :-{!X90_Get_Pricebook_ID.Currency__c}
  4. Pricebook :- {!Pricebook_all}
  5. Quick Close :- {!fxQuickCloseFinal} {!fxQuickCloseNotice}
  6. Record Type :- {!X45_Get_Selected_Record_Type.Name}

fields.name: disp_service_info
fields.fieldText:
Service Details:

  1. OneSource Type :- {!fxOSType}
  2. Implementation Date :- {!Implementation_Date}
  3. Length Of Contract :- {!Length_of_Contract}
  4. ﻿Project Id :- {!Project_Id}

fields.name: disp_dealer_details
fields.fieldText:
Dealer Details:

  1. End User Country :- {!End_User_Country.recordName}

fields.name: QuoteDetailsOne
fields.fieldText:
General Quote Details

  1. ﻿﻿Bill To Account :- {!AccountName.recordName}
  2. Primary Contact :- {!ShipToContactQuote.selectedChoiceLabels}
  3. Ship To Account :- {!ShipToAccountQuote.recordName}
  4. Ship To Contact :- {!ShipToContactQuote.selectedChoiceLabels}
  5. ﻿Bill Cycle :- {!BillCycleQuote}
  6. Opportunity Name :- {!fxOppName_default}
  7. Owner :- {!fxUserName}

fields.name: QuoteDetailsOne_Service
fields.fieldText:
General Quote Details

  1. ﻿﻿Bill To Account :- {!AccountName.recordName}
  2. Primary Contact :- {!ShipToContactQuote.selectedChoiceLabels}
  3. Ship To Account :- {!ShipToAccountQuote.recordName}
  4. Ship To Contact :- {!ShipToContactQuote.selectedChoiceLabels}
  5. ﻿Bill Cycle :- {!Bill_Cycle_Service}
  6. Opportunity Name :- {!fxOppName_default}
  7. Owner :- {!fxUserName}

fields.name: QuoteDetailsTwo
fields.fieldText:
General Quote Details

  1. Pricebook :- {!Pricebook_all}
  2. Currency :- {!X90_Get_Pricebook_ID.Currency__c}
  3. Sales Type :- {!fxCalculateSalesType}
  4. Primary :- true
  5. Status :- Draft
  6. Sales Rep :- {!fxUserName}
  7. Quote Expiration :- {!fxDefaultClosedDate}

fields.name: disp_buttontext
fields.fieldText:
Click Create Opp to create this opportunity

Click Go back to go back and make changes

screens.helpText: Review All Data below before making the opportunity

screens.description: This node is added on behalf of Ticket#-INC0318508
screens.name: X120_f_Disp_Opportunity_Creation_Error
screens.label: 120.f Disp Opportunity Creation Error

screens.description: This node is added on behalf of Ticket#-INC0318508
screens.name: X130a_1f_Disp_Opportunity_Updation_Error
screens.label: 130a.1f Disp Opportunity Updation Error

fields.name: text_OppCreatedSucess
fields.fieldText:
{!fxUserFirstname}, Your Opportunity Created Successfully!



Click the link below to view the Opportunity:


{!Opportunity_Name}


﻿

fields.name: QuoteDetailsSummary
fields.fieldText:
Your Quote Created Successfully!



Click the link below to view the Quote:


{!GetQuoteNumber.Name}

fields.name: oppCreationErrorMsg
fields.fieldText:
There was an error Creating the opportunity.

Please go back and try again, or refresh the page if needed


-------------------------------

You can provide a screenshot of this error to the SFDC Admin Team if the issue persists.

Error :- {!$Flow.FaultMessage}



﻿-------------------------------------------

﻿FOR DEBUG & ADMINS ONLY:


User Name :- {!fxUserName}

Account Name :- {!AccountName.recordName}

Contact Name :- {!ContactName.recordName}

﻿Opportunity Name :- {!fxOppName}

Starting Object: {!fxStartingObject}

Contact Last Name: {!fxContactLastName}

Contact Full Name: {!single_contact.Name}

Get Primary Contact Name: {!X10a_1_Get_Primary_Contact.Contact.Name}

Interaction Contact Name: {!single_interaction.Contact__r.Name}

Interaction Lead Name: {!single_interaction.Lead__r.Name}

Stage: {!fxDefaultOppStage}

Default Close Date: {!fxDefaultClosedDate}

User Close Date: {!Close_Date_input}

Record Type ID: {!X80_LKUP_Record_Type_ID.resultRecordTypeId}

fxSalesType: {!fxSalesType}

fxType: {!fxType}

fxOSType: {!fxType}

Solution Area Of Interest :- {!Solution_Area_of_Interest}

Product Line Name :- {!Product_Lines}

OneSource Type :- {!fxOSType}

Implementation Date :- {!Implementation_Date}

﻿Length Of Contract :- {!Length_of_Contract}

﻿Project Id :- {!Project_Id}

screens.name: x40_screen1_Opportunity_Basics
screens.label: 40. Screen 1: Opportunity Basics

fields.name: Screen1Header
fields.fieldText: {!fxUserFirstname}'s Quick Create Opportunity

fields.name: disp_accountContact
fields.fieldText: Account & Contact:

fields.name: Contact_Text
fields.helpText: This is the name found as text, but we can not locate a Record for this. Lookup the Contact Record above, or a new Contact record will be created

fields.name: disp_oppFields
fields.fieldText:
Opportunity Details:

(The Opportunity name will be auto-populated and standardized).

validationRule.errorMessage: You can not select Quick Close for this Type of Opportunity.
validationRule.formulaExpression: IF( {!Quick_Close} = True, IF(NOT(CONTAINS('100,110,170,180,200,210' , LEFT({!Type},3))), false, true) ,true )

fields.name: Product_Lines
fields.helpText: Please select one or more product lines. Use the CTRL key + Left Click to select multiple items

fields.name: Length_of_Contract
fields.helpText: Please enter data in months e.g. 20 months

validationRule.errorMessage: Enter a number 1 through 96 for months

fields.name: Project_Id
fields.helpText: Enter the Project ID for the Customer

fields.name: What
fields.helpText: Critical business issue and problem that the customer is trying to solve or achieve (Customer Pain)

fields.name: Why
fields.helpText: What is the desired customer outcome (Solution for Customer’s Pain)

fields.name: QuoteSection
fields.fieldText: Quote Details:

fields.name: disp_screen1_clickNext
fields.fieldText: Click REVIEW OPP to review your opportunity details before creating

screens.helpText:
This quick create opportunity form will allow you to add the basic details needed to create a new opportunity.


The fields can pre-populate when using the embedded form in a page. (Using the 'Quick Create Opportunity' at top of a record, will start with all fields blank)


Based on the record you start from (i.e Account, Contact, Lead, Opportunity, Interaction) known data from that record will populate. when using the form embedded in the +Opp tab.

screens.description: This node is added on behalf of Ticket#-INC0318508
screens.name: X5a_1_Disp_SAP_Contact_ID_Error
screens.label: 5a.1 Disp SAP Contact ID Error

fields.name: disp_SAP_CONTACTID_error
fields.fieldText:
Opportunity cannot be created on this contact without any PKI SAP Contact ID.


Kindly click Send to SAP button on the contact record before creating the opportunity.

screens.description: If they have errors to fix from screen 1
screens.name: X60b_1_screen_1a_Account_Error
screens.label: 60b.1 screen_1a: Account Error

fields.name: displ_warnBadAccount
fields.fieldText:
WARNING: The Account selected is not valid.


The Account selected was: {!AccountName.recordName}





Please click PREVIOUS to go back and choose a different account.

screens.description: If they have errors to fix from screen 1
screens.name: X70a_1_screen_1b_Contact_Error
screens.label: 70a.1 screen_1b: Contact Error

fields.name: displ_NewContactneeded
fields.fieldText:
WARNING: The Contact selected does not belong to the Account selected.


The Account selected was: {!AccountName.recordName}


{!X60a_2_get_Contact_Info.Name} is linked to Account: {!X60a_2_get_Contact_Info.Account.Name}




Please click PREVIOUS to go back and choose a different contact record.

subflows.description: Get the Record type using an reuseable L.FLOW
subflows.name: X80_LKUP_Record_Type_ID
subflows.label: 80. LKUP Record Type ID

textTemplates.name: txtGetShipToContact
textTemplates.text: Select ID, Name, BD_Contact_Name_Label__c FROM Contact WHERE AccountId = '{!ShipToAccountQuote.recordId}' AND PKI_SAP_Contact_ID__c != NULL ORDER BY BD_Contact_Name_Label__c ASC

textTemplates.description: The interview Label of this Opp
textTemplates.name: txtInterviewLabel
